_about: Repos to mount under team/. team/ is a mount point, not a new home: each person's Claude clones the entries whose group they belong to (see local/groups). Nothing here is moved or renamed, repos keep their real names and their existing hosts. KEEP THIS FILE GENERIC: it is in core and ships to everyone, so do NOT list private/company repo URLs here. Put real private repo lists in local/team.manifest.json (gitignored, same format), so they never reach core and the OS stays open-sourceable. hydrate reads both.

_schema.name: folder name created under team/ (use the repo's real name)
_schema.remote: git URL to clone (keeps its real name and host)
_schema.group: access tag; only machines whose local/groups lists this group will clone it. Omit for everyone.
